title: Modern slavery exploitation marker in drugs case
offenceWording: Being concerned in the supply of Class A drugs
mainIssue: The bundle contains exploitation markers but not the underlying safeguarding or NRM material.
uncertainEvidence: whether exploitation is evidenced, alleged, or only a safeguarding concern
expectedTodayIssue: Flag exploitation as a possible issue and chase safeguarding/NRM material without asserting it as fact.
expectedSummaryRisk: Potential exploitation must be separated from established facts and source state.
polishOnlyWarnings: must stay client-safe and avoid overpromising defence outcomes
